case_title: CHU PERCY VS EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL EXPRESS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $208.52 FILED BY CHU PERCY AS TO DEFENDANT EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL EXPRESS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU PERCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL EXPRESS INC. $208.52 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $247.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL EXPRESS INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $280.05 AS TO DEFENDANT EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL EXPRESS INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL EXPRESS INC.
